mechanism.feature_identity: Daily Treasury Statement nondebt fiscal impulse, frozen year-over-year 4-week construction
mechanism.daily_formula: opening operating cash balance minus closing operating cash balance minus redemptions plus issues
mechanism.rolling_window: sum the daily formula over observed DTS report dates in the inclusive 28-calendar-day interval from t minus 27 days through t; a count-based alternative is forbidden
mechanism.seasonal_difference: rolling_28_calendar_day_sum(t) minus rolling_28_calendar_day_sum(t minus 364 calendar days)
mechanism.state_direction: SPY only when the 28-day, 364-day seasonal difference is strictly greater than zero; otherwise CASH
mechanism.monthly_state_input: The adapter consumes the already-frozen literal state SPY or CASH and mechanically binds its source row; it does not repair or reverse the state.
mechanism.report_availability: Each DTS report row becomes usable at 16:00 America/New_York on the next observed DTS report date, never on its own report date.

signal_boundary.source_availability_required: 16:00 America/New_York on the next observed DTS report date and no later than decision_at
signal_boundary.decision_at: 20:05 America/New_York on the accepted XNYS session immediately preceding the execution month
signal_boundary.execution_session: first accepted XNYS session of each state month
signal_boundary.terminal_month: the immediately following month; pretrade mark only and never traded
signal_boundary.session_coverage: Each segment must contain exactly one accepted session before its first execution, and its terminal-month execution session must be the final row; earlier or later overcoverage fails closed.
signal_boundary.adapter_responsibility: validate and execute frozen states only
forbidden: inspect or ingest real feature values

portfolio.strategy: 100 percent SPY or zero-return CASH subject to whole shares and settled cash
portfolio.monthly_comparator: 50 percent SPY and 50 percent zero-return cash under the identical execution and settlement contract
portfolio.buyhold_comparator: buy SPY once at the first monthly execution and hold
portfolio.decision_price: raw close of the accepted XNYS session immediately preceding execution
portfolio.execution_price: raw open of the first accepted XNYS session of the month

cash_settlement.sale_settlement: derive the exact accepted-session path mechanically through cash_settlement_lag_sessions
cash_settlement.historical_schedule: T+3 before 2017-09-05, T+2 from 2017-09-05 through 2024-05-27, and T+1 on and after 2024-05-28

corporate_actions.cash_distribution: freeze SPY entitlement from session-open shares on official ex-date and settle on official pay date
corporate_actions.split: apply an identified ordinary split through the shared Portfolio primitive only when all resulting holdings and targets remain whole shares; otherwise fail closed

secondary.sealed_until_validation_gates: exactly 3 of 3, mechanically recomputed from immutable performance paths
secondary.nonoverlap: The validation and secondary month ranges are disjoint; overlap, subset, omission, duplicate row, and reorder fail closed.

input_identity.fiscal_states_sha256: mechanically recomputed from the exact ordered month, state, decision_at, source_available_at, and source_row_sha256 rows
input_identity.market_rows_sha256: mechanically recomputed from exact ordered session date, raw SPY open, and raw SPY close rows
input_identity.calendar_sha256: mechanically recomputed from the exact ordered accepted-session dates
input_identity.validation_result_binding: records the complete segment identity, exact state months, terminal month, and ordered source-row SHA256 identities
input_identity.secondary_fiscal_and_code_rule: fiscal receipt, definition, and adapter identities must exactly match validation; secondary fiscal state rows remain segment-specific
input_identity.secondary_market_rule: market receipt, market rows, and accepted calendar identities must each be independent from validation

measurement.interval_return: monthly execution pretrade NAV to the next monthly execution pretrade NAV
measurement.paired_active_return: strategy interval return minus the same-interval 50 percent SPY comparator return
measurement.paired_active_summary: arithmetic mean across the exact complete interval pairs
measurement.maximum_drawdown: daily raw-open NAV path with the initial USD 40000 point included
measurement.terminal_month: pretrade mark only; no terminal trade or next-interval cost

gates_per_segment: strategy terminal wealth strictly above the monthly 50 percent SPY comparator
paired arithmetic mean active return strictly above zero
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY buy-and-hold
unresolved_evidence_gaps: No real DTS state values or market outcomes are present or opened on this branch.
Caller-provided accepted XNYS sessions and official corporate-action identities remain external qualified inputs.
